expectations.text: Uses only the specified files (index.html, Card.tsx) as review targets
expectations.evidence: Review header lists exactly 2 target files: 'features/web-sample/pages/index.html' and 'features/web-sample/components/Card.tsx'. All findings reference only these two files.

expectations.text: Does not run git diff to find additional files
expectations.evidence: Only index.html and Card.tsx are reviewed. No additional files from git diff appear in the output.

expectations.text: Delegates to accessibility skill with the specified file set
expectations.evidence: No skill was used. Accessibility section uses generic WCAG 2.1 SC references (1.1.1, 2.1.1, 4.1.1, 2.4.1, 1.3.1) rather than KWCAG2.2 33-item structured checklist. No systematic item-by-item evaluation or 시맨틱 HTML checklist.

expectations.text: Delegates to seo skill with the specified file set
expectations.evidence: No skill was used. SEO section uses ad-hoc numbering (2.1-2.6) and Performance section uses ad-hoc numbering (3.1-3.7) rather than structured SEO-01~11 and WP-01~18 item codes. No systematic 29-item framework evaluation.

expectations.text: Generates unified HTML + CSV report combining both areas
expectations.evidence: Output is a single structured report covering Accessibility, SEO, Performance, and Security with a combined summary table. Covers both areas in a unified format, though as Markdown rather than HTML/CSV files.

expectations.text: Report covers KWCAG2.2 items, semantic HTML, SEO-01~11, WP-01~18
expectations.evidence: Report does not use KWCAG2.2 item numbering, does not have a semantic HTML checklist, and does not use SEO-01~11 or WP-01~18 codes. It covers accessibility, SEO, and performance topics but without the structured item framework specified.
